acceptance_criteria.description: OCR file upload endpoint receives the file correctly (IFormFile is not null) when called from React Native with FormData — multipart boundary is present.
verify: manual: upload a PDF from the mobile app in dev environment; backend logs show 'File received: <filename>', not '400 FILE_REQUIRED'

acceptance_criteria.description: Docker container appuser can write to /app/uploads directory; LocalFileStorageAdapter creates subdirectories successfully at runtime.
verify: manual: docker run couplesync-api and verify /app/uploads is owned by appuser via 'docker exec ... ls -la /app/'

acceptance_criteria.description: PdfPig successfully extracts non-empty text from a text-based Brazilian bank statement PDF (at least 50 characters extracted).
Bank auto-detection correctly identifies the bank from extracted PDF text for at least 5 of the 7 supported banks using keyword matching.
verify: unit: BankDetectorTests with fixture text samples for Inter, Nubank, Itau, Santander, BB

acceptance_criteria.description: Bank-specific regex parsers return correctly structured ParsedTransaction lists (date, description, amount, type) from representative PDF text fixtures for at least 3 banks.
verify: unit: InterBankParserTests, NubankParserTests, ItauParserTests with sample fixture strings

acceptance_criteria.description: When USE_LOCAL_PDF_PARSER=true (default), DependencyInjection registers LocalPdfParserProvider for IOcrProvider; AzureDocumentIntelligenceAdapter is NOT invoked.
verify: manual: set USE_LOCAL_PDF_PARSER=true in docker-compose.yml and verify Gemini/Azure API is never called during an OCR job

acceptance_criteria.description: No Alert.alert() calls remain in mutation error handlers in the mobile app (budget/index.tsx, OcrReviewScreen.tsx, and any other onError handlers).
verify: cmd: grep -r "Alert.alert" mobile/app/ mobile/src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' (must return 0 results in mutation onError blocks)
static: code review confirms all onError handlers use useToast() hook

acceptance_criteria.description: Styled toast/snackbar component renders with error styling (red background, white text, dismiss button) when a mutation fails; auto-dismisses after 4 seconds.
verify: manual: on physical Android device, trigger budget save failure (disconnect network) and observe styled toast instead of native dialog

acceptance_criteria.description: When a 403 COUPLE_REQUIRED error is received, the app displays 'Conecte-se com seu parceiro primeiro' with a navigation link to the couple setup screen — not a generic error message.
verify: manual: log in as a user without a couple; attempt budget save; verify specific message and nav link appear

acceptance_criteria.description: Budget screen renders the ErrorState component with a retry button when the budget query returns an error; the retry button calls refetch().
verify: unit: BudgetScreenTests.RendersErrorState_WhenQueryFails (mock query hook to return isError=true)
manual: simulate network failure on budget screen load; confirm ErrorState is visible with retry option

acceptance_criteria.description: Quick Income Update modal on Dashboard sends a PATCH /api/v1/budget/income request; the Dashboard income display reflects the new value within 1 navigation cycle without requiring a full budget flow.
verify: manual: tap 'Atualizar renda' on Dashboard; enter new income; save; verify amount updates on Dashboard without navigating to budget screen

acceptance_criteria.description: After OCR processing completes, each extracted transaction candidate has a suggestedCategoryId populated (or null if Gemini call fails/times out); categorization failure does not block import confirmation.

ChatContextService.BuildSystemPromptAsync() includes a 'Financial Goals' section listing active goal names, target amounts, progress amounts, progress %, and deadlines when the couple has at least one active goal.
Reports screen renders a bar chart (last 6 months per-category totals) and a pie chart (current month category breakdown) with real data from the couple's transaction history.
verify: manual: navigate to Reports tab; verify bar and pie charts render with data labels and are interactive (tap to view details)
manual: verify charts are empty/zero-state when couple has no transaction history (no crash)

acceptance_criteria.description: GET /api/v1/reports/spending?months=6 returns couple-scoped monthly spending aggregated by category; couples cannot see each other's data; unauthenticated requests return 401.
docs/app-usage-guide.md exists, covers: what CoupleSync is, key features, how to use the app, and a comparison table with Mobills, Organizze, YNAB, Splitwise, and Honeydue.
verify: manual: document contains comparison table with at least 5 competitor entries and CoupleSync column
